Things like behavioral guidance, knowledge assistance, automation of workflows, like note-taking and summarization for the agents all in real time while they're on the conversations.

When we think about like our products and how we break down pricing and packaging and sort of alignment of the products, QM and coaching go together as sort of like post-call functions where we're using AI to evaluate what the agents did on the call, score them against criteria that are aligned to outcomes and then have that drive human-to-human coaching sessions between supervisors and the agents.
So agent assist is, I mean, it's all synergistic, right?

Like those things layer and they should be based on the same logic, but it is a different product pillar for us than what we would put into what we call conversation intelligence, which wraps around the insights product and then QM and coaching.
